results.title: Former soccer players show brain changes but no cognitive decline, researchers find
results.description: The study, by researchers at Imperial College London, included 142 former players aged between 30 and 60 and compared them to 56 similarly aged healthy people with no history of contact sports.

results.title: The component linked to anxiety is found in every fruit
results.description: Fructose is naturally found in fruits and vegetables, and a new study suggests that when part of it is not digested properly, it can affect not only the stomach, but also the brain.
